news_list.title: UPI Turns 10: 703 Banks Live, 60 Crore Daily Transactions; IMF Calls It World's Largest Real-Time Payment System
news_list.summary:
New Delhi: The Unified Payments Interface (UPI), launched on April 11, 2016 by the National Payments Corporation of India (NPCI) under the regulatory oversight of the Reserve Bank of India (RBI), has emerged as the backbone of India's digital payments ecosystem and a critical driver of financial inclusion.

Over a decade of operations, UPI has demonstrated extraordinary scale and momentum. Annual transaction volume expanded from just 2 crore transactions in FY 2016-17 to over 24,162 crore transactions in FY 2025-26, representing an almost 12,000-fold surge in transaction volume. Parallelly, transaction value rose sharply from Rs 0.07 lakh crore in FY 2016-17 to approximately Rs 314 lakh crore in FY 2025-26, translating into a more than 4,000-fold increase in transaction value, according to a release from the Ministry of Finance.

news_list.title: Soaring oil prices ease and markets rise | MACAU DAILY TIMES 澳門每日時報
news_list.summary:
Oil futures fell yesterday while Wall Street rose even as stalled U.S.-Iran talks raised doubts over the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and a permanent end to the Iran war.

U.S. markets ticked higher before the bell with some of the country's biggest technology companies posting first quarter earns this week.

Futures for the S&P 500 rose 0.4% before the opening bell, while futures for the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.6%. Nasdaq futures gained 0.5%.

Brent crude to be delivered in June slid $1.93 overnight to $108.51 per barrel. That remains extraordinarily high. Before the war began in late February, Brent crude was trading around $70 per barrel.

Benchmark U.S. crude also slid, falling $2.37 per barrel to $104.51 per barrel, but U.S. gasoline prices continue to tick higher. The average price for a gallon of regular gasoline jumped another 7 cents overnight to $4.30. The price at this point last year was $3.18.

The U.S. has continued its blockade of Iranian ports while the Strait of Hormuz is closed, pushing oil prices higher in recent days.

Reports yesterday suggesting a possible escalation by U.S. President Donald Trump doused hopes for a quick end to the conflict.

"The breakdown of talks between the U.S. and Iran, along with President Trump reportedly rejecting Iran's proposal for a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, has the market losing hope for any quick resumption in oil flows," ING Bank strategists Warren Patterson and Ewa Manthey wrote in a research note.

Oil prices vary depending on the type of crude oil, where it is being traded and under what terms, for futures contracts. By some measures, Brent has hit its highest level since its peak of $147.50 per barrel in 2008 during the global financial crisis.

In equities trading, Alphabet jumped 7.4% overnight after Google's parent company delivered another quarter of stellar growth driven by its investment in artificial intelligence. Those investments, CEO Sundar Pichai said, "are lighting up every part of the business."

Alphabet earned $62.6 billion, or $5.11 per share, during the January-March period, an 81% increase from the same time last year.

Shares of Facebook owner Meta tumbled 9% overnight after it posted better-than-expected results but raised its forecast for capital expenditures. The owner of Instagram and Facebook earned $26.77 billion, or $10.44 per share, in the January-March period, up about 61% from $16.64 billion, or $6.43 per share, in the same period a year earlier.

Elsewhere, Bank of England kept its main interest rate on hold at 3.75% yesterday as policymakers assess the economic impact of the Iran war and Tehran's effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz, through which a fifth of the world's crude passes. The decision was widely expected and echoes the decision of the U.S. Federal Reserve on Wednesday to keep rates unchanged.

Asian stocks mostly fell. Tokyo's Nikkei 225 shed 1% to 59,284.92 and the Kospi in South Korea fell 1.4% to 6,598.87.

news_list.title: Argus Clean Ammonia Asia Conference | Overview | Argus Media
news_list.summary:
Join regional and international peers to explore market development for clean ammonia in Asia

Join senior leaders in Tokyo - one of Asia's key clean ammonia demand hubs - to unlock new opportunities, build partnerships, and gain actionable insight into today's market realities and future outlooks at the region's premier event for the ammonia sector.

As the industry has carried forward the headwinds experienced in 2025, 2026 has also brought wider global changes across energy and commodity markets, further reshaping cost structures, trade flows, and investment priorities. In this environment, continued, informed discussion around decarbonisation and clean ammonia adoption in Asia remains critical.

With key policy developments emerging in Japan during 2026, the implications of recent shifts in Korean policy coming into clearer focus, and heightened geopolitical and market uncertainty influencing supply security, this event provides the right platform for timely market intelligence, peer exchange, and practical discussion on navigating opportunity and risk in a changing global landscape.

news_list.title: "Dollar-won exchange rate retreats to the upper 1,470-won level"
news_list.summary:
Provided by Yonhap News Agency

The dollar-won exchange rate closed in the upper 1,470-won range in overnight trading.

Following direct intervention in the foreign exchange market by the Japanese authorities, the dollar-won rate plunged and then pared losses.

At 2 a.m. KST on the 1st, USD/KRW finished at 1,477.50 won, down 1.50 won from the previous Seoul session close.

Compared with the day session (9:00~3:30) close of 1,483.30 won, it was 5.80 won lower.

Ahead of New York trading, USD/KRW fell to an intraday low of 1,472.50 won and then rebounded.

The Nihon Keizai Shimbun (Nikkei) reported that on the evening of the 30th local time, the Japanese government and the Bank of Japan (BOJ) intervened in the FX market by buying yen and selling dollars, citing a government official who confirmed the intervention.

It was the first actual FX market intervention by Japan since July 2024. As the dollar-yen rate exceeded 160, widely seen as a threshold for intervention, authorities appear to have acted. The dollar-yen rate plunged to around 155.6 during the session before a modest rebound.

The U.S. Dollar Index (DXY), which shows the value of the U.S. dollar against six major currencies, was pushed down to the low 98s by yen strength. In Asia trading, it had briefly edged above 99.

Around 2:58 a.m., USD/JPY traded at 156.480 yen, and the euro-dollar rate was at $1.17260. The offshore dollar-yuan rate moved at 6.8327 yuan.

The yen-won cross rate was 947.86 won per 100 yen, and the yuan-won rate traded at 216.99 won.

The intraday high for USD/KRW was 1,488.00 won and the low was 1,472.50 won, for a range of 15.50 won.

Total spot FX trading volume through the overnight session was tallied at $17.988 billion, combining Seoul Foreign Exchange Brokerage and Korea Money Brokerage.

한글기사 원본(Original Korean Story)

items.summary: 在 AI 需求爆發與科技巨頭財報優於預期帶動下，美國科技股 4 月強勢反彈，創下疫情以來最佳單月表現。市場情緒快速翻多，資金重新回流成長型科技股。

items.title: 美股創2020年來最佳單月表現 分析師：市場對油價衝擊仍不以為意

items.title: AI支出大增 輝達為何反跌逾4%？
items.summary: 理論上，最新一輪科技巨頭財報所釋出的數據，應該對輝達 (Nvidia)(NVDA-US) 是利多。大型雲端公司正加速投入人工智慧 (AI) 晶片，而輝達正是該市場的最大業者。

ai_analysis.full_text:
【今日結論】
台股休市期間，美股雖創歷史新高，但油價大跌暗示的「需求破壞」與台指夜盤回落，為下週開盤帶來多空交戰的格局。市場焦點將是台積電 ADR 高達 17% 的溢價能否帶動大盤開高，抑或被宏觀經濟的疑慮所抵銷。
【新聞驅動】
市場主線圍繞著矛盾的 AI 敘事與地緣政治風險。一方面，蘋果財報優於預期、台積電 ADR 大幅溢價，強化了 AI 需求的樂觀預期；但另一方面，輝達股價逆勢下跌，伴隨著「史上最大資本錯置」的雜音，顯示市場對 AI 龐大支出的可持續性產生疑慮。同時，伊朗對荷姆茲海峽的強硬言論雖一度推升油價，但隨後油價重挫，反映出市場更擔心地緣政治引發的經濟衰退風險。
【國際與台股】
國際市場呈現明顯分歧：美股四大指數在降溫的美元與通膨預期下全面上漲並創下新高，VIX 指數大跌，顯示華爾街情緒偏向樂觀。然而，此樂觀情緒並未完全傳導，台指期夜盤與富台指均小幅收黑，暗示市場對追高存有戒心。對台股而言，最重要的定錨是台積電 ADR 換算價已達 2,511 元，與現貨的巨大價差是下週一多頭能否續攻的關鍵指標。
【KOL與情緒】
市場情緒指標呈現分裂，美股的「貪婪」與加密貨幣市場的「恐懼」形成對比，而社群上「金融危機」的熱搜也反映散戶潛在的不安。這種現象表明，雖然機構資金仍在追逐美股強勢股 (Risk-On)，但部分投資人已開始尋找避險管道或對市場高點感到憂慮，這種情緒分歧可能導致下週市場波動加劇。
【操作含意】
展望下週一開盤，台積電巨大的 ADR 溢價提供了向上開盤的動能，但須提防開高走低的可能，關鍵在於溢價能否有效收斂。盤中最重要的觀察指標是布蘭特原油價格，若油價持續在 111 美元下方承壓，將證實市場對「需求破壞」的擔憂，屆時市場定價邏輯可能從 AI 狂熱轉向對經濟衰退的預防，投資人應警惕宏觀風險蓋過個股利多的可能性。

selected_charts.title: 美股與風險資產
selected_charts.description: S&P 500、Nasdaq、SOX、VIX 與美元、黃金、原油的跨資產訊號。
selected_charts.takeaway: 台股休市期間，美股主要指數如 S&P 500 (+1.02%)、Nasdaq (+0.89%) 與費城半導體 (+2.26%) 均上漲，VIX 恐慌指數則大幅回落 (-10.21%)，顯示市場風險偏好回溫。然而，布蘭特原油價格重挫超過 5%，可能反映市場對全球需求前景的擔憂。
selected_charts.action: 觀察股市的樂觀情緒與商品市場的悲觀預期之間的角力，確認何者將主導下週市場方向。

selected_charts.title: 盤前指標
selected_charts.description: Nasdaq 期貨、台積電 ADR、台灣 ETF 與台股盤前連動。
selected_charts.takeaway: 休市期間，與台股連動密切的盤前指標呈現正向訊號。Nasdaq 期貨上漲近 1%，台積電 ADR (+0.57%) 與台灣相關 ETF (+3.09%) 也同步走高，為下週台股開盤提供了有利的外部環境。
selected_charts.action: 關注台股開盤後能否延續此動能，特別是權值股台積電的表現，以及其 ADR 溢價是否會收斂。

selected_charts.title: 科技主題熱度圖
selected_charts.description: 科技新聞主題與市場主線的熱度排名與來源證據。
selected_charts.takeaway: 本週市場主線聚焦於宏觀與地緣政治。因應強勢美元，日本央行進場干預，引發匯市波動；同時，美伊談判停滯與荷莫茲海峽的緊張局勢，持續影響油價與全球供應鏈穩定，這些宏觀不確定性是觀察下週市場風險的關鍵。
selected_charts.action: 追蹤美元、日圓匯率走勢，以及中東地緣政治的最新發展，評估其對股市與能源價格的潛在衝擊。

chart_orchestration.overall_summary: 台股休市期間，美股雖創歷史新高，但油價大跌暗示的「需求破壞」與台指夜盤回落，為下週開盤帶來多空交戰的格局。市場焦點將是台積電 ADR 高達 17% 的溢價能否帶動大盤開高，抑或被宏觀經濟的疑慮所抵銷。

news_themes.label: 日本干預匯市應對強勢美元，各國央行政策分歧
news_themes.summary: 聯準會（FED）與英國央行維持高利率不變，持續支撐美元強勢。為應對日圓大幅貶值，日本當局自 2024 年來首度直接進場干預、買入日圓，導致美元兌日圓匯率急挫，並引發韓元等亞洲貨幣劇烈波動，凸顯各國央行在強勢美元下的政策分歧與市場動盪。
evidence: FED維持利率不變，支撐美元...
the Japanese government and the Bank of Japan (BOJ) intervened in the FX market by buying yen and selling dollars, citing a government official who confirmed the intervention.
As the dollar-yen rate exceeded 160, widely seen as a threshold for intervention, authorities appear to have acted.
The dollar-won exchange rate closed in the upper 1,470-won range in overnight trading.

news_themes.label: 美伊談判停滯，荷莫茲海峽封鎖致油價高漲
news_themes.summary: 儘管油價略有回落，但仍處於異常高位。市場擔憂主要來自於美國與伊朗的談判陷入僵局，以及關鍵航道荷莫茲海峽的持續封鎖，這對全球五分之一的原油供應構成威脅，使能源市場前景充滿不確定性。
evidence: stalled U.S.-Iran talks raised doubts over the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and a permanent end to the Iran war.
The U.S. has continued its blockade of Iranian ports while the Strait of Hormuz is closed, pushing oil prices higher in recent days.
Brent crude to be delivered in June slid $1.93 overnight to $108.51 per barrel. That remains extraordinarily high.

news_themes.label: 印度 UPI 支付系統十年有成，引領全球即時支付
news_themes.summary: 印度統一支付介面（UPI）成立十年來經歷爆炸性成長，日交易量達 6 億筆，獲國際貨幣基金（IMF）譽為全球最大的即時支付系統。UPI 的成功不僅重塑了印度的數位支付生態，也成為推動金融普惠的關鍵力量。
evidence: UPI Turns 10: 703 Banks Live, 60 Crore Daily Transactions; IMF Calls It World's Largest Real-Time Payment System
Over a decade of operations, UPI has demonstrated extraordinary scale and momentum.

chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: 目前 AI 敘事出現分歧，摘要提到蘋果財報優於預期，但輝達股價卻下跌。現有圖表無法突顯這些關鍵個股的表現差異，需要一個專門圖表來追蹤 AI 核心股票的走勢，以判斷市場對 AI 敘事的信心是全面性的還是有所分化。
data_needed: Daily price change for key AI stocks like NVDA, AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMD
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: ai_summary: 蘋果財報優於預期、台積電 ADR 大幅溢價...但另一方面，輝達股價逆勢下跌，伴隨著「史上最大資本錯置」的雜音
